response.step_by_step_log: The video was reviewed to identify the performer, Murasaki Shion, and the song, 'Mikazuki'. The original artist is Sayuri. A search for 'ミカツキ さユり Japanese and English lyrics' was performed, which successfully provided both original and translated lyrics. The video structure involves an intro segment with the character moving through a virtual space, followed by the main performance beginning around 03:59.
response.global_summary: A single-song performance video featuring an animated character, identified as Murasaki Shion, performing a cover of the song 'Mikazuki' by the original artist Sayuri. The video shows the character walking past framed displays of other performances before starting her own, which is staged in a mystical, nocturnal setting.

scenes.description: Animated character (Murasaki Shion) walks past multiple framed performance displays, then enters a stage area with a moon and starry background to perform 'Mikazuki'.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
今宵も頭上では
綺麗な満月がキラキラ
幸せそうに世界を
照らしている

どの私も
出来損ないでどうしようもなくて
夜明け夢見ては
地べた這いずり回ってる

それでも誰かに
見つけてほしくて
夜空見上げて叫んでいる
逃げ出したいなあ
逃げ出せない
明るい未来は見えないね

それでもあなたに
見つけてほしくて
蝶のように
舞い上がるの
欠けた翼で飛んだ
醜い星の子ミカヅキ
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Even tonight, above my head
The beautiful full moon is sparkling
Illuminating the world that seems to be happy

What about me? I can't even do that right
I'm at a loss, and I'm just dreaming of the dawn
While dragging my feet on the ground

Still, I want someone to find me
Looking up at the night sky and shouting
I want to escape, but I can't escape
I can't see a bright future, can I?

Still, I want you to find me
Soaring like a butterfly
With broken wings, the ugly star child 'Mikazuki' flew.

scenes.description: Murasaki Shion begins performing the song 'Mikazuki' on stage. Song title and artist credits appear on screen.
